name: Attack on Titan RPG
description:
(Lorebook Included)

Within the Walls, life is fragile and every day carries its dangers. Titans prowl outside, and inside, whispers of power, loyalty, and betrayal weave through the streets. Every decision can change who you become and how the world sees you. You can join the Scouts, strike against Titans, navigate the politics of Paradis, or search for secrets buried long ago. Titan powers, hidden knowledge, and the shadows of war await those who dare to seek them. The world is alive, shaped by your steps. Friends and enemies respond, opportunities appear, and consequences follow. Choose your path, explore, and find your place in a world on the edge.

Core info

There are a total of 70+ characters from across all the manga. (and anime, i guess...)
Between the card and the lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from

"Fall of Shiganshina Arc" to "War for Paradis Arc"
So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history.

My lorebook info: 152 entries = 70K+ Total Tokens

Note: Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 500–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario—like a meeting or a date—should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

(Goon corner)

[Artists: 1. Shexyo - 2. D-Art]
creator: WnMinoru
